title: ferray-core: no frombuffer / from_raw_parts constructor
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.frombuffer() creates an array from a bytes object without copying. This is essential for zero-copy interop with mmap, shared memory, network buffers, and other languages. ferray-core has ArrayView::from_shape_ptr() (unsafe) for views, but no owned-array constructor that takes ownership of an existing allocation (like Vec::from_raw_parts). A safe from_buffer(bytes: &[u8], dtype: DType, shape) -> ArrayView and an unsafe from_raw_parts(ptr, shape, strides) -> Array would round out the construction API.
